inputs.name: allowAddParallelNodes
inputs.description: Enables or disables ability to add parallel nodes

inputs.name: allowSendRemindersForStatuses
inputs.description: A list of approval statuses that allow sending reminders to their approvers

inputs.name: approvalStatusTemplate
inputs.description: A reference to the app custom statuses

inputs.name: checkDueDate
inputs.description: Whether to display due date warning in status

inputs.name: disableExitButton
inputs.description: Disables exit button, exit button is enabled by default

inputs.name: disableSaveButton
inputs.description: Disables save button, save button is enabled by default

inputs.name: dueDateThreshold
inputs.description:
Number of days before due date when status changes to `warning` with text 'Due in X days'.
 Not used if 'checkDueDate' equals false

inputs.name: isEditAvailable
inputs.description: Whether the approval flow is editable

inputs.name: removeSpaceNode
inputs.description: Should remove the space node from the graph

inputs.name: statusColorMapping
inputs.description: Custom status to color mapping

inputs.name: teamDataSource
inputs.description: Data source for the teams of Approval Flow component.

inputs.name: teamsDataProviderEntityKey
inputs.description:
Name of the entity for which teams DataProvider will be loaded.
Internally we should be able to do lookup to some registry
and retrieve the best matching DataProvider that is set on application level

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: Title which is displayed in the header of the Approval Flow component.

inputs.name: userDataSource
inputs.description: Data source for the users of Approval Flow component.

inputs.name: userDetailsTemplate
inputs.description: A reference to the user details template

inputs.name: usersDataProviderEntityKey
inputs.description:
Name of the entity for which users DataProvider will be loaded.
Internally we should be able to do lookup to some registry
and retrieve the best matching DataProvider that is set on application level

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Value of the approval flow component.

inputs.name: watcherDataSource
inputs.description: Data source for the watchers of Approval Flow component.

inputs.name: watchersDataProviderEntityKey
inputs.description:
Name of the entity for which approval flow DataProvider will be loaded.
Internally we should be able to do lookup to some registry
and retrieve the best matching DataProvider that is set on application level

inputs.name: watchersLabel
inputs.description: Text label for watchers list

outputs.name: afterNodeAdd
outputs.description: Event emitted on approval flow node add

outputs.name: afterNodeEdit
outputs.description: Event emitted on approval flow node edit

outputs.name: nodeClick
outputs.description: Event emitted on approval flow node click.

outputs.name: onDataReceived
outputs.description: Event emitted when data loading is finished.

outputs.name: onDataRequested
outputs.description: Event emitted when data loading is started.

outputs.name: sendReminders
outputs.description: Event emitted whenever reminders should be sent

outputs.name: valueChange
outputs.description: Event emitted whenver save is clicked in edit mode

methods.name: nextSlide
methods.description: Scroll to the next horizontal slide
